projects.title: Taskomon
projects.role: Frontend engineering, product UI, interaction systems
projects.summary: A productivity web app built around task bubbles, a companion assistant, and playful task-management feedback.
projects.practicalFocus: Shows how a practical productivity app can become more engaging through visible task states, fast scanning, and personality.
features: Task bubble interface for quick visual scanning
Project structure ready for screenshots and future case-study notes
process: Designed the page around the user loop: capture, focus, complete, receive feedback.
Used playful UI language while preserving practical task organization.
Prepared portfolio screenshots so visitors can judge the interface directly.
nextSteps: Add a live deployment link when available.
Document component structure and data flow.
Add a short case study around the productivity loop.

projects.title: Red Flagger

projects.summary: A collaborative software engineering project focused on detecting and surfacing red-flag patterns among OKCupid profiles datasets.
projects.practicalFocus: A collaborative software engineering project focused on detecting and surfacing red-flag patterns among OKCupid profiles datasets.
process: Framed the project around a clear user decision point.

Document the analysis approach and limitations.
Attach a demo or walkthrough when available.
